summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Drider SaaS platform - both backend APIs and frontend UI flows tested. Found critical backend ObjectId serialization issues affecting admin content creation, but core authentication and user flows working properly.

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 500 Internal Server Error due to ObjectId serialization
Returns 500 Internal Server Error due to ObjectId serialization
Returns 500 Internal Server Error due to ObjectId serialization
Returns 500 - Payment order creation failed: Authentication failed
critical_bugs.error_details: Razorpay authentication failure with placeholder keys

ui_bugs.issue: Admin user redirected to regular dashboard instead of admin dashboard after login

integration_issues.issue: Admin forms submit but fail due to backend 500 errors

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix MongoDB ObjectId serialization errors in admin content creation endpoints. The backend is returning MongoDB documents with ObjectId fields that cannot be JSON serialized. Need to exclude '_id' field or convert ObjectIds to strings. Also fix Razorpay integration with proper API keys for payment testing.

success_percentage.frontend: 90% (Most UI flows working, admin content creation blocked by backend)
